allow: PowerShell(curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "home %{time_total}s`n" "http://localhost:3000/"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "musings %{time_total}s`n" "http://localhost:3000/musings"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "monologue %{time_total}s`n" "http://localhost:3000/monologue"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "home_again %{time_total}s`n" "http://localhost:3000/")

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "admin_login %{time_total}s`n" "http://localhost:3000/admin/login"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "admin_posts %{time_total}s`n" "http://localhost:3000/admin/posts"; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "api_posts %{time_total}s`n" "http://localhost:3000/api/admin/posts")
